Enumeration.Name: TriggerSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the type of trigger to configure.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the type of trigger to configure. The TriggerSelector is limited to the values LineStart and FrameStart in the SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects a trigger that starts the acquisition of one or more images according to AcquisitionMode.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects a trigger that starts the acquisition of one or more images according to AcquisitionMode.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionEnd
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects a trigger that ends the acquisition of one or more images according to AcquisitionMode.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects a trigger that ends the acquisition of one or more images according to AcquisitionMode.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects a trigger starting the capture of one image.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects a trigger starting the capture of one image.

EnumEntry.Name: LineStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects a trigger starting the capture of one line of an image (mainly used in linescan mode).
EnumEntry.Description: Selects a trigger starting the capture of one line of an image (mainly used in linescan mode).

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects a trigger controlling the start of the exposure of one image.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects a trigger controlling the start of the exposure of one image.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureEnd
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects a trigger controlling the end of the exposure of one image.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects a trigger controlling the end of the exposure of one image.

Enumeration.Name: TriggerMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if the selected trigger is active.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if the selected trigger is active. The access changes to read-only during an acquisition.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the selected trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the selected trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: On
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Enables the selected trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Enables the selected trigger.

Enumeration.Name: TriggerSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Specifies the internal signal or physical input Line to use as the trigger source.
Enumeration.Description: Specifies the internal signal or physical input line to use as the trigger source. The selected trigger must have its TriggerMode set to On. The access changes to read-only during an acquisition.

EnumEntry.Name: Software
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger source will be generated by software using the TriggerSoftware command.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger source will be generated by software using the TriggerSoftware command.

EnumEntry.Name: Line0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Line0 (trigger input) as external source for the trigger signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Line0 (trigger input) as external source for the trigger signal. For interpreting the trigger signal, either the rising or the falling edge can be used.

EnumEntry.Name: Line1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Line1 (flash output) as external source for the trigger signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Line1 (flash output) as external source for the trigger signal. For interpreting the trigger signal, either the rising or the falling edge can be used.

EnumEntry.Name: Line2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use the General Purpose I/O Line2 (GPIO1) as external source for the trigger signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use the General Purpose I/O Line2 (GPIO1) as external source for the trigger signal. For interpreting the trigger signal, either the rising or the falling edge can be used.

EnumEntry.Name: Line3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use the General Purpose I/O Line3 (GPIO2) as external source for the trigger signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use the General Purpose I/O Line3 (GPIO2) as external source for the trigger signal. For interpreting the trigger signal, either the rising or the falling edge can be used.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use UserOutput0 as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use UserOutput0 as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use UserOutput1 as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use UserOutput1 as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use UserOutput2 as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use UserOutput2 as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use UserOutput3 as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use UserOutput3 as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter0Start
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Counter0Start signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Counter0Start signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter1Start
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Counter1Start signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Counter1Start signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter0End
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Counter0End signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Counter0End signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter1End
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Counter1End signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Counter1End signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer0Start
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Timer0Start signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Timer0Start signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer1Start
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Timer1Start signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Timer1Start signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer0End
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Timer0End signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Timer0End signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer1End
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Timer1End signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Timer1End signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: PWM0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger source will be generated by PWM0.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger source will be generated by PWM0.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter0Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Counter0Active signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Counter0Active signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter1Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Counter1Active signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Counter1Active signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer0Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Timer0Active signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Timer0Active signal as internal source for the trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer1Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies to use Timer1Active signal as internal source for the trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies to use Timer1Active signal as internal source for the trigger.

Enumeration.Name: TriggerActivation
Enumeration.ToolTip: Specifies the activation mode of the trigger.
Enumeration.Description: Specifies the activation mode of the trigger. The access changes to read-only during an acquisition.

EnumEntry.Name: RisingEdge
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the rising edge of the source signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the rising edge of the source signal.

EnumEntry.Name: FallingEdge
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the falling edge of the source signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the falling edge of the source signal.

EnumEntry.Name: AnyEdge
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the falling or rising edge of the source signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the falling or rising edge of the source signal.

EnumEntry.Name: LevelHigh
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the source signal is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the source signal is HIGH.

EnumEntry.Name: LevelLow
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the source signal is LOW.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the source signal is LOW.

Command.Name: TriggerSoftware
Command.Description: Generates an internal trigger. TriggerSource must be set to Software.

Float.Name: TriggerDelay
Float.ToolTip: Specifies the delay in microseconds (us) between the reception of the trigger signal and the trigger activation.
Float.Description: Specifies the delay in microseconds (us) between the reception of the trigger signal and the trigger activation. Further Trigger pulses arriving during the delay are not processed. The access changes to read-only during an acquisition.

Integer.Name: TriggerDivider
Integer.ToolTip: If TriggerDivider is set to a value x > 1, only every x-th source signal will activate the trigger.
Integer.Description: If TriggerDivider is set to a value x > 1, only every x-th source signal will activate the trigger. Using TriggerDivider can be useful for source signals with high frequency. It reduces the signal to the desired frequency for acquisition. A typical example is an encoder. The access changes to read-only during an acquisition.

Command.Name: TimestampReset
Command.ToolTip: Resets the current value of the device timestamp counter.
Command.Description: Resets the current value of the device timestamp counter.

Enumeration.Name: AcquisitionMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Sets the acquisition mode of the camera.
Enumeration.Description: Sets the acquisition mode of the camera. It defines the number of images to capture during an acquisition. The access changes to read-only during an acquisition.

EnumEntry.Name: SingleFrame
EnumEntry.ToolTip: One image is captured.
EnumEntry.Description: One image is captured.

EnumEntry.Name: MultiFrame
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The number of images specified by AcquisitionFrameCount is captured.
EnumEntry.Description: The number of images specified by AcquisitionFrameCount is captured.

EnumEntry.Name: Continuous
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Images are captured until stopped with the AcquisitionStop command.
EnumEntry.Description: Images are captured until stopped with the AcquisitionStop command.

Integer.Name: AcquisitionFrameCount
Integer.ToolTip: Number of images to acquire in MultiFrame AcquisitionMode.
Integer.Description: Number of images to acquire in MultiFrame AcquisitionMode.

Enumeration.Name: SensorShutterMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the shutter mode of the device.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the shutter mode of the device.

EnumEntry.Name: Global
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Global
EnumEntry.Description: The shutter opens and closes at the same time for all pixels. All pixels have the same exposure time and the exposure of all pixels starts simultaneously.

EnumEntry.Name: Rolling
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Rolling
EnumEntry.Description: The shutter opens and closes sequentially for the pixels. All pixels have the same exposure time but the exposure of the pixel lines starts sequentially.

EnumEntry.Name: GlobalReset
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Global Reset
EnumEntry.Description: The shutter opens at the same time for all pixels but ends in a sequential manner. Each pixel line has a different exposure time but the exposure of all pixels starts simultaneously.

Command.Name: AcquisitionAbort
Command.Description: Aborts the Acquisition immediately. This will end the capture without completing the current Frame or waiting on a trigger. If no Acquisition is in progress, the command is ignored.

Boolean.Name: AcquisitionFrameRateTargetEnable
Boolean.ToolTip: Sets if AcquisitionFrameRateTarget is used to control the acquisition rate.
Boolean.Description: Sets if AcquisitionFrameRateTarget is used to control the acquisition rate.

Float.Name: AcquisitionFrameRateTarget
Float.ToolTip: Controls the acquisition rate (in hertz) at which the images are captured if AcquisitionFrameRateTargetEnable is true.
Float.Description: Controls the acquisition rate (in hertz) at which the images are captured if AcquisitionFrameRateTargetEnable is true. This setting is only effective if the "ExposureStart" trigger is disabled.

Integer.Name: SensorFrameTimeClocksTarget
Integer.ToolTip: SensorFrameTimeClocksTarget
Integer.Description: SensorFrameTimeClocksTarget

Integer.Name: TransferQueueCurrentBlockCount
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the number of Block(s) currently in the transfer queue.
Integer.Description: Returns the number of Block(s) currently in the transfer queue.

Integer.Name: TransferQueueMaxBlockCount
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the maximum number of data blocks that can be stored in the block queue of the selected stream.
Integer.Description: Controls the maximum number of data blocks that can be stored in the block queue of the selected stream.

Enumeration.Name: TransferControlMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the control method for the transfers.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the control method for the transfers.

EnumEntry.Name: Automatic
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Automatic
EnumEntry.Description: Automatic

Command.Name: DeviceReset
Command.ToolTip: Resets the camera to its power-up state.
Command.Description: Resets the camera to its power-up state. After reset, the camera must be rediscovered.

Command.Name: ResetToFactoryDefaults
Command.ToolTip: Reset user settings to factory default.
Command.Description: Reset user settings to factory default.

Enumeration.Name: DeviceBootStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the current boot status.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the current boot status.

EnumEntry.Name: OK
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Booting the camera was successful.
EnumEntry.Description: Booting the camera was successful.

EnumEntry.Name: WatchdogReboot
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Camera reboot after watchdog error.
EnumEntry.Description: Camera reboot after watchdog error. This error occurs if a feature has not reacted within the watchdog timeout (approx. 30 s).

EnumEntry.Name: RepeatedWatchdogError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) Camera reboot after repeating watchdog errors.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) Camera reboot after repeating watchdog errors, falling back to SecureMode. The current Firmware or FPGA image are defective. Try to repair firmware via firmware update.

EnumEntry.Name: WatchdogRebootAfterRepeatedWatchdogError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) Camera watchdog reboot after RepeatedWatchdogError.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) Camera watchdog reboot after RepeatedWatchdogError. This error occurs if the camera started in SecureMode due to a RepeatedWatchdogError and another WatchdogError occured while running in SecureMode.
EnumEntry.DisplayName: Watchdog Reboot After Repeated Watchdog Error

EnumEntry.Name: FirmwareCorruptionError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) Could not boot the device. Firmware or FPGA image are defective.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) Could not boot the device. Firmware or FPGA image are defective. Try to repair firmware via firmware update.

EnumEntry.Name: WatchdogRebootAfterFirmwareCorruptionError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) WatchdogReboot after FirmwareCorruptionError.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) WatchdogReboot after FirmwareCorruptionError.
EnumEntry.DisplayName: Watchdog Reboot After Firmware Corruption Error

EnumEntry.Name: FirmwareMissingError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) Could not boot the device. Missing Firmware.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) Could not boot the device. Missing Firmware. Try to repair firmware via firmware update.

EnumEntry.Name: WatchdogRebootAfterFirmwareMissingError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) WatchdogReboot after FirmwareMissingError.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) WatchdogReboot after FirmwareMissingError.

EnumEntry.Name: BootDataCorruptionError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) Could not boot the device. Boot data is defective.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) Could not boot the device. Boot data is defective. Try to repair firmware via firmware update.

EnumEntry.Name: WatchdogRebootAfterBootDataCorruptionError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: (SecureMode) WatchdogReboot after BootDataCorruptionError.
EnumEntry.Description: (SecureMode) WatchdogReboot after BootDataCorruptionError.
EnumEntry.DisplayName: Watchdog Reboot After Boot Data Corruption Error

EnumEntry.Name: CriticalErrorReboot
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Critical error in sensor communication.
EnumEntry.Description: Critical error in sensor communication. Try to use a different firmware version. Contact your camera manufacturer.

EnumEntry.Name: CriticalErrorWhileStarting
EnumEntry.ToolTip: A critical error occured while booting the device. Firmware or FPGA is defective.
EnumEntry.Description: A critical error occured while booting the device. Firmware or FPGA is defective. Try to repair firmware via firmware update.

EnumEntry.Name: CriticalErrorWhileConfiguring
EnumEntry.ToolTip: A critical error occured while configuring the device. Firmware or FPGA is defective.
EnumEntry.Description: A critical error occured while configuring the device. Firmware or FPGA is defective. Try to repair firmware via firmware update.

EnumEntry.Name: CriticalUSBErrorReboot
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Non-Recoverable error in USB connection.
EnumEntry.Description: Non-Recoverable error in USB connection. Try to use a different USB cable or contact your camera manufacturer.

Integer.Name: DeviceBootStatusAdditionalInfo1
Integer.ToolTip: Additional status information 1 for Boot Status.
Integer.Description: Additional status information 1 for Boot Status.

Integer.Name: DeviceBootStatusAdditionalInfo2
Integer.ToolTip: Additional status information 2 for Boot Status.
Integer.Description: Additional status information 2 for Boot Status.

Integer.Name: DeviceLinkSpeed
Integer.ToolTip: Indicates the speed of transmission negotiated on the specified Link.
Integer.Description: Indicates the speed of transmission negotiated on the specified Link.

Integer.Name: TestPendingAck
Integer.ToolTip: Tests the device's pending acknowledge feature.
Integer.Description: Tests the device's pending acknowledge feature. When this feature is written, the device waits a time period corresponding to the value of TestPendingAck before acknowledging the write.

Enumeration.Name: BootOptions
Enumeration.ToolTip: BootOptions
Enumeration.Description: BootOptions

EnumEntry.Name: Runtime
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Runtime Vision
EnumEntry.Description: Runtime Vision

EnumEntry.Name: Service
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Service Vision
EnumEntry.Description: Service Vision

Enumeration.Name: LineSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the physical line (or pin) of the external device connector or the virtual line of the Transport Layer to configure.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the physical line (or pin) of the I/O to configure. The signals can be inverted by activating LineInverter.

EnumEntry.Name: Line0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Physical Input Line that serves as trigger input.
EnumEntry.Description: Physical Input Line that serves as trigger input (LineMode = Input only). The digital input is galvanically isolated using an optocoupler to protect the camera and the PC against surges. Only DC voltages may be applied to the digital input.

EnumEntry.Name: Line1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Physical Output Line that serves as flash output.
EnumEntry.Description: Physical Output Line that serves as flash output (LineMode = Output only).The digital output is galvanically isolated using an optocoupler to protect the camera and the PC against surges. Only DC voltages may be applied to the digital output.

EnumEntry.Name: Line2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: General Purpose I/O (GPIO1) that can be used as input or output.
EnumEntry.Description: General Purpose I/O (GPIO1) that can be used as input or output. To configure the line as input, change LineMode to Input. To configure the line as output, change LineMode to Output. Attention: The General Purpose IO is not potential-free and has no protective circuit. Faulty wiring (overvoltage, undervoltage) could cause damage to the electronics.

EnumEntry.Name: Line3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: General Purpose I/O (GPIO2) that can be used as input or output.
EnumEntry.Description: General Purpose I/O (GPIO2) that can be used as input or output. To configure the line as input, change LineMode to Input. To configure the line as output, change LineMode to Output. Attention: The General Purpose IO is not potential-free and has no protective circuit. Faulty wiring (overvoltage, undervoltage) could cause damage to the electronics.

Enumeration.Name: LineMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if the physical Line is used to Input or Output a signal.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if the physical line is used as input or output.

EnumEntry.Name: Input
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The selected physical line is used as input.
EnumEntry.Description: The selected physical line is used as input.

EnumEntry.Name: Output
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The selected physical line is used as output.
EnumEntry.Description: The selected physical line is used as output.

Boolean.Name: LineInverter
Boolean.ToolTip: Controls the inversion of the signal of the selected input or output Line.
Boolean.Description: Controls whether the selected line signal is inverted.

Boolean.Name: LineStatus
Boolean.ToolTip: Returns the current status of the selected input or output Line.
Boolean.Description: Returns the current status of the selected input or output line.

Enumeration.Name: LineFormat
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the current electrical format of the selected physical input or output Line.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the current electrical format of the selected physical input or output Line.

EnumEntry.Name: TriState
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The Line is currently in Tri-State mode (Not driven).
EnumEntry.Description: The Line is currently in Tri-State mode (Not driven).

EnumEntry.Name: OptoCoupled
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The Line is opto-coupled.
EnumEntry.Description: The Line is opto-coupled.

EnumEntry.Name: LVTTL
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The Line is currently accepting or sending LVTTL level signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The Line is currently accepting or sending LVTTL level signals.

Boolean.Name: LineNoiseFilterEnable
Boolean.ToolTip: Category that contains the digital input and output control features.
Boolean.Description: Activates the noise suppression only for all input lines.

Integer.Name: LineNoiseFilterClockFrequency
Integer.ToolTip: LineNoiseFilterClockFrequency
Integer.Description: LineNoiseFilterClockFrequency

Integer.Name: LineNoiseFilterDurationClocks
Integer.ToolTip: LineNoiseFilterDurationClocks
Integer.Description: LineNoiseFilterDurationClocks

Float.Name: LineNoiseFilterDuration
Float.ToolTip: Max duration of pulses that are filtered by this module.
Float.Description: Max duration of pulses that are filtered by this module.

Integer.Name: LineStatusAll
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the current status of all available Line signals at time of polling in a single bitfield.
Integer.Description: Returns the current status of all available line signals. The status is written in a single bitfield.

Enumeration.Name: UserOutputSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which bit of the User Output register will be set by UserOutputValue.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which bit of the User Output register will be set by UserOutputValue.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the bit 0 of the User Output register.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the bit 0 of the User Output register.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the bit 1 of the User Output register.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the bit 1 of the User Output register.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the bit 2 of the User Output register.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the bit 2 of the User Output register.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the bit 3 of the User Output register
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the bit 3 of the User Output register

Boolean.Name: UserOutputValue
Boolean.ToolTip: Sets the value of the bit selected by UserOutputSelector.
Boolean.Description: Sets the value of the bit selected by UserOutputSelector.

Integer.Name: UserOutputValueAll
Integer.ToolTip: Sets the value of all the bits of the User Output register.
Integer.Description: Sets the value of all the bits of the User Output register. It is subject to the UserOutputValueAllMask.

Integer.Name: UserOutputValueAllMask
Integer.ToolTip: Sets the write mask to apply to the value specified by UserOutputValueAll before writing it in the User Output register.
Integer.Description: Sets the write mask to apply to the value specified by UserOutputValueAll before writing it in the User Output register. If the UserOutputValueAllMask feature is present, setting the user Output register using UserOutputValueAll will only change the bits that have a corresponding bit in the mask set to one.

Enumeration.Name: LineSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which internal acquisition or I/O source signal to output on the selected Line.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which internal acquisition or I/O source signal to output on the selected line. LineSource is only applied when LineMode is set to Output.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Line output is disabled.
EnumEntry.Description: Line output is disabled.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.
EnumEntry.Description: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.
EnumEntry.Description: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.
EnumEntry.Description: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.
EnumEntry.Description: The current UserOutputValue of the chosen user output.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The camera is currently acquiring images.
EnumEntry.Description: The camera is currently acquiring images.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The camera is currently capturing one image.
EnumEntry.Description: The camera is currently capturing one image. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The camera is exposing an image.
EnumEntry.Description: The camera is exposing an image.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter0Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The chosen counter is active.
EnumEntry.Description: The chosen counter is active.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter1Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The chosen counter is active.
EnumEntry.Description: The chosen counter is active.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer0Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The chosen timer is active.
EnumEntry.Description: The chosen timer is active.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer1Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The chosen timer is active.
EnumEntry.Description: The chosen timer is active.

EnumEntry.Name: PWM0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The output of PWM0.
EnumEntry.Description: The output of PWM0.

EnumEntry.Name: ReadOutActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The camera is currently doing a sensor readout of an image.
EnumEntry.Description: The camera is currently doing a sensor readout of an image.

EnumEntry.Name: FlashActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The "FlashActive" signal is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: The "FlashActive" signal is HIGH.

Enumeration.Name: CounterSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which counter to configure.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which counter to configure.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects counter 0.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects counter 0.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects counter 1.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects counter 1.

Enumeration.Name: CounterEventSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to increment the counter.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to increment the counter.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the counter.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the counter.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionTrigger
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of AcquisitionStart trigger signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of AcquisitionStart trigger signals.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionTriggerMissed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of missed AcquisitionStart trigger signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of missed AcquisitionStart trigger signals.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of acquisition starts.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of acquisition starts.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionEnd
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of acquisition ends.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of acquisition ends.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameTrigger
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of FrameStart trigger signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of FrameStart trigger signals. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameTriggerMissed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of missed FrameStart trigger signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of missed FrameStart trigger signals. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of frame starts. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of frame starts. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameEnd
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of frame ends.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of frame ends. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: LineTrigger
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of LineStart trigger signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of LineStart trigger signals. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: LineTriggerMissed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of missed LineStart trigger signals.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of missed LineStart trigger signals. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of exposure starts.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of exposure starts.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureEnd
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the number of exposure ends.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the number of exposure ends.

EnumEntry.Name: Line0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line0 (trigger input).
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line0 (trigger input).

EnumEntry.Name: Line1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line1 (flash output).
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line1 (flash output).

EnumEntry.Name: Line2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line2 (GPIO 1).
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line2 (GPIO 1).

EnumEntry.Name: Line3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line3 (GPIO 2).
EnumEntry.Description: The counter counts the specified transitions on Line3 (GPIO 2).

Enumeration.Name: CounterResetSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to reset the counter.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to reset the counter. The CounterStatus changes to CounterTriggerWait. This source also starts the counter if CounterTriggerSource is Off. Then the CounterStatus directly changes to CounterActive. Note that the value of the counter at time of reset is automatically latched and reflected in CounterValueAtReset.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the CounterResetSource.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the CounterResetSource.

EnumEntry.Description: Resets the counter on the falling and rising edge of the CounterResetSource signal.

Enumeration.Name: CounterTriggerSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to start the counter.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to start the counter. To start the counter, it must be reset first, either by the command CounterReset or by a signal on CounterResetSource. If you want to automatically reset the counter when starting it, choose CounterResetSource = CounterTrigger. If a counter has the CounterStatus CounterIdle and its CounterEventSource is not Off, you have to perform a CounterReset.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the counter trigger.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the counter trigger.

Command.Name: CounterReset
Command.ToolTip: Does a software reset of the selected counter.
Command.Description: Does a software reset of the selected counter. The CounterStatus changes to CounterTriggerWait. If no counter trigger is active (CounterTriggerSource = Off), the counter starts counting events immediately after the reset and the CounterStatus changes to CounterActive. CounterReset can be used to reset the counter independently from the CounterResetSource. To disable the counter temporarily, set CounterEventSource to Off. Note that the value of the counter at time of reset is automatically latched and reflected in CounterValueAtReset.

Integer.Name: CounterValue
Integer.ToolTip: Reads or writes the current value of the selected counter.
Integer.Description: Reads or writes the current value of the selected counter. Writing to CounterValue is typically used to set the start value.

Integer.Name: CounterValueAtReset
Integer.ToolTip: Reads the value of the selected counter at the time of its reset.
Integer.Description: Reads the value of the selected counter at the time of its reset by the CounterResetSource or by the CounterReset command. CounterValueAtReset represents the last counter value latched before resetting the counter.

Integer.Name: CounterDuration
Integer.ToolTip: Sets the number of events (duration) before the counter stops counting.
Integer.Description: Sets the number of events (duration) before the counter stops counting. The event for incrementing the counter is defined by CounterEventSource. When the counter reaches the CounterDuration value, it stops counting. At the same time, a CounterEnd signal is generated, the CounterStatus changes to CounterCompleted and the CounterActive signal is set to LOW.

Enumeration.Name: CounterStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the current status of the counter.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the current status of the counter.

EnumEntry.Name: CounterIdle
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter is idle.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter is idle. To start the counter, perform a counter reset.

EnumEntry.Name: CounterTriggerWait
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter is waiting to be started.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter is waiting to be started by a trigger on CounterTriggerSource or by the CounterReset command.

EnumEntry.Name: CounterActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter is counting for the specified CounterDuration.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter is counting for the specified CounterDuration.

EnumEntry.Name: CounterCompleted
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter has reached the CounterDuration count.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter has reached the CounterDuration count. To start the counter again, perform a counter reset.

EnumEntry.Name: CounterOverflow
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The counter has reached its maximum possible count.
EnumEntry.Description: The counter has reached its maximum possible count.

Enumeration.Name: TimerSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the timer to be configured.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the timer to be configured.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects Timer 0.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects timer 0.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects Timer 1.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects timer 1.

Float.Name: TimerDuration
Float.ToolTip: Sets the duration (in microseconds) before the timer stops counting.
Float.Description: Sets the duration (in microseconds) before the timer stops counting. When the timer reaches the TimerDuration value, it stops counting. At the same time, a TimerEnd signal is generated, the TimerStatus changes to TimerCompleted and TimerActive is set to LOW.

Float.Name: TimerValue
Float.ToolTip: Reads the current value (in microseconds) of the selected timer.
Float.Description: Reads the current value (in microseconds) of the selected timer.

Float.Name: TimerDelay
Float.ToolTip: Sets the delay (in microseconds) to apply at the reception of a TimerTriggerSource signal before starting the timer.
Float.Description: Sets the delay (in microseconds) to apply at the reception of a TimerTriggerSource signal before starting the timer.

Command.Name: TimerReset
Command.ToolTip: Does a software reset of the selected timer.
Command.Description: Does a software reset of the selected timer. Starts the timer unless a TimerTriggerSource is active.

Enumeration.Name: TimerStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the current status of the timer.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the current status of the timer.

EnumEntry.ToolTip: The timer is idle.
EnumEntry.Description: The timer is idle.

EnumEntry.ToolTip: The timer is counting for the specified TimerDuration.

EnumEntry.Name: TimerCompleted
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The timer has reached the TimerDuration.
EnumEntry.Description: The timer has reached the TimerDuration.

Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to start the timer.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the internal signal or physical input line that will be the source to start the timer.
