Enumeration.Name: PWMSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which pulse width modulation module to configure.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which pulse width modulation module to configure.

EnumEntry.Name: PWM0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the PWM0.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the PWM0.

Enumeration.Name: PWMTriggerSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the internal signal or physical input Line that will be the source to start the PWM.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the internal signal or physical input Line that will be the source to start the PWM. On default, the PWM is active as long as the signal is HIGH. Changing the PWMTriggerActivation to LevelLow, the PWM is active as long as the signal is LOW.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the PWM.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the PWM.

EnumEntry.Name: AcquisitionActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active as long as the camera acquires images.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active as long as the camera acquires images.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active during the exposure of images.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active during the exposure of images.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the UserOutput0 is set to True.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the UserOutput0 is set to True.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the UserOutput1 is set to True.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the UserOutput1 is set to True.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the UserOutput2 is set to True.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the UserOutput2 is set to True.

EnumEntry.Name: UserOutput3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the UserOutput3 is set to True.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the UserOutput3 is set to True.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter0Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the Counter0 is counting.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the Counter0 is counting.

EnumEntry.Name: Counter1Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the Counter1 is counting.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the Counter1 is counting.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer0Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: TThe PWM is active while the Timer0 is counting.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the Timer0 is counting.

EnumEntry.Name: Timer1Active
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the Timer1 is counting.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the Timer1 is counting.

EnumEntry.Name: FrameActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active during the exposure of one image.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active during the exposure of one image. Only available in SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: FlashActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the FlashActive signal is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the FlashActive signal is HIGH.

EnumEntry.Name: Line0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line0 is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line0 is HIGH.

EnumEntry.Name: Line1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line1 is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line1 is HIGH.

EnumEntry.Name: Line2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line2 is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line2 is HIGH.

EnumEntry.Name: Line3
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line3 is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: The PWM is active while the signal on the Line3 is HIGH.

Enumeration.Name: PWMTriggerActivation
Enumeration.ToolTip: Specifies the activation mode of the PWMTriggerSource signal.
Enumeration.Description: SSpecifies the activation mode of the PWMTriggerSource signal.

EnumEntry.Name: LevelHigh
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the PWMTriggerSource signal is HIGH.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the PWMTriggerSource signal is HIGH.

EnumEntry.Name: LevelLow
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the PWMTriggerSource signal is LOW.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid as long as the level of the PWMTriggerSource signal is LOW.

Float.Name: PWMFrequency
Float.ToolTip: Specifies the frequency of the PWM pulse signal.
Float.Description: Specifies the frequency of the PWM pulse signal. The unit of the frequency is Hz.

Integer.Name: PWMDutyCycle
Integer.ToolTip: Specifies the duty cycle of the PWM.
Integer.Description: Specifies the duty cycle of the PWM. Defines the fraction of one pulse (in %) in which the PWM signal is HIGH.

Enumeration.Name: DeviceScanType
Enumeration.ToolTip: Defines the current scan type of the camera.
Enumeration.Description: Defines the current scan type of the camera.

EnumEntry.Name: Areascan
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The image acquisition takes place simultaneously on all sensor lines (2D image acquisition).
EnumEntry.Description: The image acquisition takes place simultaneously on all sensor lines (2D image acquisition).

EnumEntry.Name: Linescan
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The image acquisition takes place line by line one after the other. The image output is 2D.
EnumEntry.Description: The image acquisition takes place line by line one after the other. The image output is 2D.

Float.Name: AcquisitionLineRate
Float.ToolTip: Controls the acquisition rate (in hertz) at which the lines of an image are captured.
Float.Description: Controls the acquisition rate (in hertz) at which the lines of an image are captured. The TriggerMode of the LineStart trigger must be Off. This feature is only available with the SensorOperationMode Linescan.

Integer.Name: SensorLineClocks
Integer.ToolTip: SensorLineClocks
Integer.Description: SensorLineClocks

Enumeration.Name: SensorOperationModeRaw
Enumeration.ToolTip: SensorOperationModeRaw
Enumeration.Description: SensorOperationModeRaw

Enumeration.Name: SensorOperationMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Specifies the operation mode of the sensor.
Enumeration.Description: Specifies the operation mode of the sensor. The SensorOperationMode is changed via UserSetSelector.

EnumEntry.Name: LongExposure
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Sensor settings optimized for image acquisition with long exposures.
EnumEntry.Description: Sensor settings optimized for image acquisition with long exposures.

EnumEntry.Name: Default
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Recommended sensor settings for standard applications.
EnumEntry.Description: Recommended sensor settings for standard applications.

EnumEntry.Name: Linescan
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Sensor settings for linescan applications.
EnumEntry.Description: Sensor settings for linescan applications.

EnumEntry.Name: LinescanSensor
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Native sensor linescan mode.
EnumEntry.Description: Native sensor linescan mode.

Float.Name: DeviceLinkAcquisitionFrameRateLimit
Float.ToolTip: Returns the maximum AcquisitionFrameRate.
Float.Description: Returns the maximum AcquisitionFrameRate that can be reached with the bandwidth defined by DeviceLinkThroughputLimit.
Float.DisplayName: Device Link Acquisition Frame Rate Limit

Integer.Name: LogicBoardType
Integer.ToolTip: Logic Board Type
Integer.Description: Logic Board Type

Integer.Name: LogicBoardFirehare
Integer.ToolTip: Logic Board Firehare
Integer.Description: Logic Board Firehare

Integer.Name: SensorBoardType
Integer.ToolTip: Sensor Board Type
Integer.Description: Sensor Board Type

Integer.Name: SensorBoardFirehare
Integer.ToolTip: Sensor Board Firehare
Integer.Description: Sensor Board Firehare

Integer.Name: ConnectorBoardType
Integer.ToolTip: Connector Board Type
Integer.Description: Connector Board Type

Integer.Name: ConnectorBoardFirehare
Integer.ToolTip: Connector Board Firehare
Integer.Description: Connector Board Firehare

Command.Name: DeviceRegistersStreamingStart
Command.ToolTip: Prepare the device for registers streaming without checking for consistency.
Command.Description: Prepare the device for registers streaming without checking for consistency.

Command.Name: DeviceRegistersStreamingEnd
Command.ToolTip: Announce the end of registers streaming.
Command.Description: Announce the end of registers streaming. This will do a register set validation for consistency and activate it. This will also update the DeviceRegistersValid flag.

Enumeration.Name: UserSetSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the user set that has to be loaded, saved or configured.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the user set that has to be loaded, saved or configured. User sets do include the LUT settings. Loading a user set can affect the availability and behavior of multiple camera features. The following parameters are only available, if a user set for SensorOperationMode Linescan has been loaded: / - LineTrigger and LineTriggerMissed signals as source for timers and counters, i.e. the features TimerTriggerSource, CounterTriggerSource, CounterEventSource and CounterResetSource. / - FrameActive as source for the PWM and output lines, i.e. the features PWMTriggerSource and LineSource. / - AcquisitionLineRate for acquisitions with untriggered lines. / - TriggerSelector values LineStart and FrameStart. // The SensorOperationMode Linescan is subject to the following restrictions: / - ExposureAuto and GainAuto are not available. / - BinningHorizontal and BinningVertical are not available. / - DecimationVertical is not available. / - Debayered PixelFormats RGB8, BGR8, RGB10p32 and BGR10p32 are not available. / - TriggerSelector is limited to the values LineStart and FrameStart.

EnumEntry.Name: Default
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the default setting.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the default setting. Loading the user set Default guarantees a state where a continuous acquisition is started that uses only the mandatory features. It is compatible with the most applications. Sets the SensorOperationMode to Default.

EnumEntry.Name: UserSet0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the user defined setting UserSet0.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the user defined setting UserSet0.

EnumEntry.Name: UserSet1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the user defined setting UserSet1.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the user defined setting UserSet1.

EnumEntry.Name: Linescan
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the Linescan user set.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the Linescan user set. It is the optimized setting for line scan mode without line loss. The exposure time is set to its minimum. Onboard Debayering is not available. The scan line is vertically centered and the default image height is set to 1024. The SensorHeight defines the height of the scan line and is set to 1 for mono cameras and 2 for color cameras. Sets the SensorOperationMode to Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: LinescanHighSpeed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the LinescanHighSpeed user set.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the LinescanHighSpeed user set. It is the speed optimized setting for line scan mode and only available for mono cameras. Lines may be lost between two frames. The exposure time is set to its minimum. Onboard Debayering is not available. The scan line is vertically centered and the default image height is set to 1024. The SensorHeight defines the height of the scan line and is set to 1. Sets the SensorOperationMode to LinescanSensor.

EnumEntry.Name: LongExposure
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the LongExposure user set.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the LongExposure user set. It is the optimized setting for long exposure mode. The PixelFormat is set to a bit depth higher than 8 bit, if available, and the source gain of the sensor is adjusted. Sets the SensorOperationMode to LongExposure.

Command.Name: UserSetLoad
Command.ToolTip: Loads the user set that is specified by UserSetSelector to the camera and activates it.
Command.Description: Loads the user set that is specified by UserSetSelector to the camera and activates it. The access changes to not-available during an acquisition. And the access is not-available for user-defined user sets (UserSet0 and UserSet1) as long as no camera settings have yet been saved via UserSetSave for those user-defined user sets.

Command.Name: UserSetSave
Command.ToolTip: Saves the camera parameters into the user defined user set that is specified by UserSetSelector.
Command.Description: Saves the camera parameters into the user defined user set that is specified by UserSetSelector. The access changes to not-available during an acquisition. And the access changes to not-available if a predefined user set, e.g. Default or Linescan is specified by UserSetSelector.

Enumeration.Name: UserSetDefault
Enumeration.ToolTip: Defines which user set has to be loaded and activated by default when the device is reset.
Enumeration.Description: Defines which user set has to be loaded and activated by default when the device is reset. If Default is selected, the camera will boot with the default settings and makes sure that the continuous acquisition is ready to be used.

EnumEntry.Name: Default
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The user set Default is loaded and activated when the device is reset.
EnumEntry.Description: The user set Default is loaded and activated when the device is reset.

EnumEntry.Name: UserSet0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The user set UserSet0 is loaded and activated when the device is reset.
EnumEntry.Description: The user set UserSet0 is loaded and activated when the device is reset.

EnumEntry.Name: UserSet1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The user set UserSet1 is loaded and activated when the device is reset.
EnumEntry.Description: The user set UserSet1 is loaded and activated when the device is reset.

EnumEntry.Name: Linescan
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The user set Linescan is loaded and activated when the device is reset.
EnumEntry.Description: The user set Linescan is loaded and activated when the device is reset.

EnumEntry.Name: LinescanHighSpeed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The user set LinescanHighSpeed is loaded and activated when the device is reset.

EnumEntry.Name: LongExposure
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The user set LongExposure is loaded and activated when the device is reset.
EnumEntry.Description: The user set LongExposure is loaded and activated when the device is reset.

Enumeration.Name: FileSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the target file in the device.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the target file in the device.

EnumEntry.Name: UserData1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: User-defined data file.
EnumEntry.Description: User-defined data file with max. 4 kB size.

EnumEntry.Name: UserData2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: User-defined data file.
EnumEntry.Description: User-defined data file with max. 4 kB size.

EnumEntry.Name: CriticalEventLog
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Log of critical Events
EnumEntry.Description: Log of critical Events

Enumeration.Name: FileOperationSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the target operation for the selected file in the camera.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the target operation for the selected file in the camera. This operation is executed when the FileOperationExecute feature is called.

EnumEntry.Name: Open
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Opens the file.
EnumEntry.Description: Opens the file selected by FileSelector in the camera. The access mode in which the file is opened is selected by FileOpenMode.

EnumEntry.Name: Close
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Closes the file.
EnumEntry.Description: Closes the file selected by FileSelector in the camera.

EnumEntry.Name: Read
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Reads data.
EnumEntry.Description: Reads data from the camera storage into FileAccessBuffer. The data is read from the file with relative offset FileAccessOffset and has the length FileAccessLength.

EnumEntry.Name: Write
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Writes data.
EnumEntry.Description: Writes data from FileAccessBuffer into the camera storage. The written data has the length FileAccessLength. For this operation, FileAccessOffset is not available. The complete file must be written all at once.

EnumEntry.Name: Delete
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Deletes the file.
EnumEntry.Description: Deletes the file selected by FileSelector in the camera. This operation does not remove the associated FileSelector entry.

Command.Name: FileOperationExecute
Command.Description: Executes the operation selected by FileOperationSelector on the file selected by FileSelector.

Enumeration.Name: FileOpenMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the access mode in which a file is opened in the camera.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the access mode in which a file is opened in the camera.

EnumEntry.Name: Read
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Read-only open mode.
EnumEntry.Description: Read-only open mode.

EnumEntry.Name: Write
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Write-only open mode.
EnumEntry.Description: Write-only open mode.

Enumeration.Name: FileOpenStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the current status of the file selected by FileSelector.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the current status of the file selected by FileSelector.

EnumEntry.Name: Close
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The file is closed.
EnumEntry.Description: The file is closed.

EnumEntry.Name: OpenRead
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The file is open with read-only access.
EnumEntry.Description: The file is open with read-only access.

EnumEntry.Name: OpenWrite
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The file is open with write-only access.
EnumEntry.Description: The file is open with write-only access.

Integer.Name: FileAccessOffset
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the offset of the FileAccessBuffer.
Integer.Description: Controls the offset of the FileAccessBuffer relative to the beginning of the selected file in the camera storage. This feature is only available when a file was opened and FileOperationSelector is set to Read.

Integer.Name: FileAccessLength
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the length of the mapping between the device file storage and the FileAccessBuffer.
Integer.Description: Controls the length of the mapping between the device file storage and the FileAccessBuffer. The FileAccessLength defines the number of bytes to transfer to or from the FileAccessBuffer. This feature is only available when a file was opened and FileOperationSelector is set to Read or Write.

Enumeration.Name: FileOperationStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Represents the file operation execution status.
Enumeration.Description: Represents the file operation execution status.

EnumEntry.Name: Success
EnumEntry.ToolTip: File Operation was successful.
EnumEntry.Description: File Operation was successful.

EnumEntry.Name: Failure
EnumEntry.ToolTip: File Operation failed.
EnumEntry.Description: File Operation failed.

Integer.Name: FileOperationResult
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the number of successfully read or written bytes.
Integer.Description: Returns the number of successfully read or written bytes if FileOperationSelector is set to Read or Write.

Integer.Name: FileSize
Integer.ToolTip: Represents the size of the selected file in bytes.
Integer.Description: Represents the size of the selected file in bytes.

Enumeration.Name: DeviceTemperatureSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the location within the camera, where the temperature is measured.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the location within the camera, where the temperature is measured.

EnumEntry.Name: Mainboard
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Temperature of the camera's mainboard.
EnumEntry.Description: Temperature of the camera's mainboard.

Float.Name: DeviceTemperature
Float.ToolTip: Camera temperature in degrees Celsius (C).
Float.Description: Camera temperature in degrees Celsius (C). It is measured at the location selected by DeviceTemperatureSelector.

Float.Name: FlashStartDelay
Float.ToolTip: Sets the delay (in microseconds) for the start of the "FlashActive" signal.
Float.Description: Sets the delay (in microseconds) for the start of the "FlashActive" signal. The delay is relative to the reference signal set in FlashReference.

Integer.Name: FlashStartDelayClocks
Integer.ToolTip: FlashStartDelayClocks
Integer.Description: FlashStartDelayClocks

Float.Name: FlashEndDelay
Float.ToolTip: Sets the delay (in microseconds) for the end of the "FlashActive" signal.
Float.Description: Sets the delay (in microseconds) for the end of the "FlashActive" signal. The delay is relative to the reference signal set in FlashReference

Integer.Name: FlashEndDelayClocks
Integer.ToolTip: FlashEndDelayClocks
Integer.Description: FlashEndDelayClocks

Float.Name: FlashDuration
Float.ToolTip: Shows the duration (in microseconds) of the "FlashActive" signal.
Float.Description: Shows the duration (in microseconds) of the "FlashActive" signal. If the value is 0 the "FlashActive" signal will not be generated.

Integer.Name: FlashDurationClocks
Integer.ToolTip: FlashDurationClocks
Integer.Description: FlashDurationClocks

Enumeration.Name: FlashReference
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the internal signal that will be the source to start the "FlashActive" signal.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the internal signal that will be the source to start the "FlashActive" signal.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Flash is active during the exposure of images.
EnumEntry.Description: Flash is active during the exposure of images.

EnumEntry.Name: GlobalFlashWindow
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The "GlobalFlashWindows" flashes when all rows of a rolling shutter sensor are exposed simultaneously.
EnumEntry.Description: The "GlobalFlashWindows" flashes when all rows of a rolling shutter sensor are exposed simultaneously.

Command.Name: I2COperationExecute
Command.ToolTip: Executes the operation selected by I2COperationSelector.
Command.Description: Executes the operation selected by I2COperationSelector.

Enumeration.Name: I2COperationStatus
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the current status of the I2C communication.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the current status of the I2C communication.

EnumEntry.Name: Ready
EnumEntry.ToolTip: I2C communication is ready.
EnumEntry.Description: I2C communication is ready.

EnumEntry.Name: InProgress
EnumEntry.ToolTip: An I2C operation is currently executed.
EnumEntry.Description: An I2C operation is currently executed.

EnumEntry.Name: Error
EnumEntry.ToolTip: An error occured while sending.
EnumEntry.Description: An error occured while sending.

EnumEntry.Name: TimeoutError
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The acknowledge signal after writing was not received.
EnumEntry.Description: The acknowledge signal after writing was not received within the given time defined in I2CAckPollingTimeout.

Enumeration.Name: I2CMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the I2C mode that determines the speed grade of I2C communication.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the I2C mode that determines the speed grade of I2C communication.

EnumEntry.Name: FastMode
EnumEntry.ToolTip: I2C fast mode with 400 kHz clock frequency.
EnumEntry.Description: I2C fast mode with 400 kHz clock frequency.

Enumeration.Name: I2COperationSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the operation for the I2C communication.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the operation for the I2C communication. This operation is executed when I2COperationExecute is called. The I2C operation is targeted at the register with IC2RegisterAddress of the device with I2CDeviceAddress.

EnumEntry.Name: Read
EnumEntry.ToolTip: I2C read command.
EnumEntry.Description: I2C read command. Reads the data from the selected register of the device into I2CData.

EnumEntry.Name: Write
EnumEntry.ToolTip: I2C write command.
EnumEntry.Description: I2C write command. Writes the data from I2CData into the selected register of the device.

Integer.Name: I2CDeviceAddressLength
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the length of I2CDeviceAddress in bits.
Integer.Description: Returns the length of I2CDeviceAddress in bits. Currently, only addresses with 7 bit length are supported.

Integer.Name: I2CRegisterAddressLength
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the length of I2CRegisterAddress in bytes.
Integer.Description: Controls the length of I2CRegisterAddress in bytes.

Integer.Name: I2CDataLength
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the length of I2CData in bytes.
Integer.Description: Controls the length of I2CData in bytes.

Integer.Name: I2CDeviceAddress
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the address of the I2C device.
Integer.Description: Controls the address of the I2C device. The maximum value of I2CDeviceAddress is limited by I2CDeviceAddressLength. Currently, only addresses with 7 bit length are supported.

Integer.Name: I2CRegisterAddress
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the address of the destination register for the operation selected by I2COperationSelector.
Integer.Description: Controls the address of the destination register for the operation selected by I2COperationSelector.

Integer.Name: I2CData
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the I2C data that is subject to the selected I2C operation.
Integer.Description: Controls the I2C data that is subject to the selected I2C operation. If I2COperationSelector is set to Read, I2CData returns the data read from the I2C device after I2COperationExecute was executed. If I2COperationSelector is set to Write, I2CData controls the data that will be sent to the I2C device when I2COperationExecute is executed. The maximum value of I2CData is limited by I2CDataLength. The access changes to read-only when I2COperationSelector is set to Read.

Boolean.Name: I2CAckPollingEnable
Boolean.Description: Enables the I2C acknowledge polling. When I2CAckPollingEnable is true, the camera waits for an acknowledge after an I2C write operation. If this acknowledge is not received within I2CAckPollingTimeout, the I2COperationStatus changes to TimeoutError.

Integer.Name: I2CAckPollingTimeout
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the I2C acknowledge polling timeout.
Integer.Description: Controls the I2C acknowledge polling timeout. The access changes to read-only when I2COperationSelector is set to Read.

Enumeration.Name: BrightnessAutoFramerateLimitMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if how the AcquisitionFrameRate is limited.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if how the AcquisitionFrameRate is limited. When the BrightnessAutoFramerateLimitMode is Fixed, the AcquisitionFrameRate will not change when a brightness auto feature is active.

EnumEntry.Name: Fixed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Keeps AcquisitionFrameRate fixed when a brightness auto feature is active.
EnumEntry.Description: Keeps AcquisitionFrameRate fixed when a brightness auto feature is active.

Enumeration.Name: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeLimitMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if the limits BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax are active.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if the limits BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax are active. When disabled, the range of ExposureTime is only limited by sensor properties and AcquisitionFrameRate. When enabled, the range of ExposureTime is limited additionally by BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax. When a brightness auto features is active, the ExposureTime can vary within this range.
Enumeration.DisplayName: Brightness Auto Exposure Time Limit Mode

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax.

EnumEntry.Name: On
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Enables BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax.
EnumEntry.Description: Enables BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin and BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax.

Float.Name: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMin
Float.ToolTip: Minimum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureAuto is enabled.
Float.Description: Minimum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureAuto is enabled.

Integer.Name: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMinClocks
Integer.ToolTip: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMinClocks
Integer.Description: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMinClocks

Float.Name: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax
Float.ToolTip: Maximum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureAuto is enabled.
Float.Description: Maximum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureAuto is enabled. When brightness auto features are active, the upper range of ExposureTime will be limited by BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMax, even if the frame rate would allow for longer exposure.

Integer.Name: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMaxClocks
Integer.ToolTip: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMaxClocks
Integer.Description: BrightnessAutoExposureTimeMaxClocks

Enumeration.Name: BrightnessAutoGainLimitMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if the limits BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax are active.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if the limits BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax are active. When disabled, the range of Gain is only limited by sensor properties. When enabled, the range of Gain is limited additionally by BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax. When a brightness auto features is active, the Gain can vary within this range.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax.

EnumEntry.Name: On
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Enables BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax.
EnumEntry.Description: Enables BrightnessAutoGainMin and BrightnessAutoGainMax.

Float.Name: BrightnessAutoGainMin
Float.ToolTip: Minimum limit of Gain when GainAuto is enabled.
Float.Description: Minimum limit of Gain when GainAuto is enabled.

Float.Name: BrightnessAutoGainMax
Float.ToolTip: Maximum limit of Gain when GainAuto is enabled.
Float.Description: Maximum limit of Gain when GainAuto is enabled.

Float.Name: BrightnessAutoPercentile
Float.ToolTip: Defines the percentage of pixels that must be brighter than BrightnessAutoTarget.
Float.Description: Defines the percentage of pixels that must be brighter than BrightnessAutoTarget. BrightnessAutoPercentile is a parameter for brightness auto features like ExposureAuto and GainAuto.

Integer.Name: BrightnessAutoTarget
Integer.ToolTip: Sets the target value for brightness auto features.
Integer.Description: Sets the target value for brightness auto features like ExposureAuto and GainAuto. The percentage of pixels, that must be brighter than BrightnessAutoTarget, is defined in BrightnessAutoPercentile. The value of BrigthnessAutoTarget relates to the current PixelFormat.

Integer.Name: BrightnessAutoTargetTolerance
Integer.ToolTip: Tolerance for BrightnessAutoTarget.
Integer.Description: Tolerance for BrightnessAutoTarget (in 8 bit). Defines an acceptance interval that surrounds BrightnessAutoTarget. If the brightness auto algorithm reaches a value within this acceptance interval, the algorithm has converged.

Enumeration.Name: GainAuto
Enumeration.ToolTip: Sets the automatic gain control.
Enumeration.Description: Sets the automatic gain control. Neither AcquisitionFrameRate nor ExposureTime settings are changed. GainAuto can be combined with ExposureAuto. GainAuto modifies AnalogAll gain, if the sensor supports it. Otherwise DigitalAll gain is used. This feature is not available with the SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: GainAuto is disabled. The user-defined control of the gain is possible with the Gain command.
EnumEntry.Description: GainAuto is disabled. The user-defined control of the gain is possible with the Gain command.

EnumEntry.Name: Once
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Gain is automatically adjusted once by the camera.
EnumEntry.Description: Gain is automatically adjusted once by the camera. Once it has converged, it automatically returns to the Off state.

EnumEntry.Name: Continuous
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Gain is constantly adjusted by the camera.
EnumEntry.Description: Gain is constantly adjusted by the camera.

Enumeration.Name: ExposureAuto
Enumeration.ToolTip: Sets the automatic exposure control when ExposureMode is Timed.
Enumeration.Description: Sets the automatic exposure control when ExposureMode is Timed. Neither AcquisitionFrameRate nor Gain settings are changed. ExposureAuto can be combined with GainAuto. This feature is not available with the SensorOperationMode Linescan.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Exposure duration is user controlled using ExposureTime.
EnumEntry.Description: Exposure duration is user controlled using ExposureTime.

EnumEntry.Name: Once
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Exposure duration is adapted once by the camera. Once it has converged, it returns to the Off state.
EnumEntry.Description: Exposure duration is adapted once by the camera. Once it has converged, it returns to the Off state.

EnumEntry.Name: Continuous
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Exposure duration is constantly adapted by the camera to maximize the dynamic range.
EnumEntry.Description: Exposure duration is constantly adapted by the camera to maximize the dynamic range.

Enumeration.Name: BalanceWhiteAuto
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls the mode for automatic white balancing between the color channels. The white balancing ratios are automatically adjusted.
Enumeration.Description: Controls the mode for automatic white balancing between the color channels. The white balancing ratios are automatically adjusted.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: White balancing is user controlled using BalanceRatioSelector and BalanceRatio.
EnumEntry.Description: White balancing is user controlled using BalanceRatioSelector and BalanceRatio.

EnumEntry.Name: Once
EnumEntry.ToolTip: White balancing is automatically adjusted once by the device. Once it has converged, it automatically returns to the Off state.
EnumEntry.Description: White balancing is automatically adjusted once by the device. Once it has converged, it automatically returns to the Off state.

EnumEntry.Name: Continuous
EnumEntry.ToolTip: White balancing is constantly adjusted by the device.
EnumEntry.Description: White balancing is constantly adjusted by the device.

Enumeration.Name: LUTSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which LUT to control.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which LUT to control.

EnumEntry.Name: Raw
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Calculation on raw values.
EnumEntry.Description: Calculation on raw values.

Boolean.Name: LUTEnable
Boolean.ToolTip: Activates the LUT selected by LUTSelector.
Boolean.Description: Activates the LUT selected by LUTSelector. If a LUT is active, gamma correction is disabled. When disabling LUT, the previous gamma correction is restored.

Integer.Name: LUTIndex
Integer.ToolTip: Selects an index to access the corresponding entry in the LUT selected by LUTSelector.
Integer.Description: Selects an index to access the corresponding entry in the LUT selected by LUTSelector. The LUT has 64 intervals with a control point at the beginning of each interval. The 64 intervals are uniformly distributed in the 12-bit range. The control points are: 0, 64, 128 ... 4032

Integer.Name: LUTValue
Integer.ToolTip: Controls the i'th value of the LUT selected by LUTSelector, at the position i defined by LUTIndex.
Integer.Description: Controls the i'th value of the LUT selected by LUTSelector, at the position i defined by LUTIndex. Values in 12 bits.

Enumeration.Name: LUTPresetSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects one of the available LUT presets.
Enumeration.Description: Selects one of the available LUT presets. To activate the function, load it via LUTPresetLoad.

EnumEntry.Name: Identity
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The values are not changed.
EnumEntry.Description: The values are not changed.

EnumEntry.Name: Inverse
EnumEntry.ToolTip: All colors are inverted.
EnumEntry.Description: All colors are inverted.

EnumEntry.Name: Binarize
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Reduces the colors to black an white and fully-saturated colors (for color cameras).
EnumEntry.Description: Reduces the colors to black an white and fully-saturated colors (for color cameras). Thera can be intermediate values in the transition interval.

EnumEntry.Name: DigitalGain2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Multiplies all color values by 2.
EnumEntry.Description: Multiplies all color values by 2. Values that are too high are clipped.

EnumEntry.Name: EnhancedContrast
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Enhances the contrast.
EnumEntry.Description: Enhances the contrast by darkening the shadows and brightening up the lights.

Command.Name: LUTPresetLoad
Command.ToolTip: Loads a LUT preset selected by LUTPresetSelector.
Command.Description: Loads a LUT preset defined by LUTPresetSelector and applies it to the LUT selected by LUTSelector.

Float.Name: Gamma
Float.ToolTip: Controls the gamma correction of pixel intensity.
Float.Description: Controls the gamma correction of pixel intensity. Gamma correction is disabled when the LUT is enabled by setting LUTEnable to True. Gamma > 1 increases image brightness. Gamma < 1 decreases image brightness.

Enumeration.Name: SequencerMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if the sequencer mechanism is active.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if the sequencer mechanism is active.

EnumEntry.Name: On
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Enables the sequencer mode.
EnumEntry.Description: Enables the sequencer mode.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the sequencer mode.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the sequencer mode.

Enumeration.Name: SequencerConfigurationMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls if the sequencer configuration mode is active.
Enumeration.Description: Controls if the sequencer configuration mode is active.

EnumEntry.Name: On
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Enables the sequencer configuration mode
EnumEntry.Description: Enables the sequencer configuration mode

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Disables the sequencer configuration mode.
EnumEntry.Description: Disables the sequencer configuration mode

Enumeration.Name: SequencerFeatureSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which sequencer features to control.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which sequencer features to control.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureTime
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Controls exposure time sequences.
EnumEntry.Description: Controls exposure time sequences.

EnumEntry.Name: Gain
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Controls gain sequences.
EnumEntry.Description: Controls gain sequences.

EnumEntry.Name: OffsetX
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Controls offset sequences in x-direction.
EnumEntry.Description: Controls offset sequences in x-direction.

EnumEntry.Name: OffsetY
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Controls offset sequences in y-direction.
EnumEntry.Description: Controls offset sequences in y-direction.

EnumEntry.Name: Flash
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Controls flash sequences.
EnumEntry.Description: Controls flash sequences.

Boolean.Name: SequencerFeatureEnable
Boolean.ToolTip: Enables the selected feature and make it active in all the sequencer sets.
Boolean.Description: Enables the selected feature and make it active in all the sequencer sets.

Integer.Name: SequencerSetSelector
Integer.ToolTip: Selects the sequencer set to which further feature settings applies.
Integer.Description: Selects the sequencer set to which further feature settings applies.

Command.Name: SequencerSetSave
Command.ToolTip: Saves the current device state to the sequencer set selected by the SequencerSetSelector.
Command.Description: Saves the current device state to the sequencer set selected by the SequencerSetSelector.

Command.Name: SequencerSetLoad
Command.ToolTip: Loads the sequencer set selected by SequencerSetSelector in the device.
Command.Description: Loads the sequencer set selected by SequencerSetSelector in the device.

Integer.Name: SequencerSetActive
Integer.ToolTip: Contains the currently active sequencer set.
Integer.Description: Contains the currently active sequencer set.

Integer.Name: SequencerSetStart
Integer.ToolTip: Sets the initial/start sequencer set, which is the first set used within a sequencer.
Integer.Description: Sets the initial/start sequencer set, which is the first set used within a sequencer.

Integer.Name: SequencerPathSelector
Integer.ToolTip: Selects to which branching path further path settings applies.
Integer.Description: Selects to which branching path further path settings applies.

Integer.Name: SequencerSetNext
Integer.ToolTip: Specifies the next sequencer set.
Integer.Description: Specifies the next sequencer set.

Enumeration.Name: SequencerTriggerSource
Enumeration.ToolTip: Specifies the internal signal or physical input line to use as the sequencer trigger source.
Enumeration.Description: Specifies the internal signal or physical input line to use as the sequencer trigger source.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies the internal signal or physical input line to use as the sequencer trigger source.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies the internal signal or physical input line to use as the sequencer trigger source.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureStart
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Sequencer proceeds to the next sequencer set when an exposure starts.
EnumEntry.Description: Sequencer proceeds to the next sequencer set when an exposure starts.

Enumeration.Name: SequencerTriggerActivation
Enumeration.ToolTip: Specifies the activation mode of the sequencer trigger.
Enumeration.Description: Specifies the activation mode of the sequencer trigger.

EnumEntry.Name: RisingEdge
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the rising edge of the source signal.
EnumEntry.Description: Specifies that the trigger is considered valid on the rising edge of the source signal.

Integer.Name: SequencerExposureTimeShadow
Integer.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Integer.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Float.Name: SequencerGainShadow
Float.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Float.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Integer.Name: SequencerOffsetXShadow
Integer.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Integer.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Integer.Name: SequencerOffsetYShadow
Integer.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Integer.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Integer.Name: SequencerFlashStartDelayShadow
Integer.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Integer.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Integer.Name: SequencerFlashEndDelayShadow
Integer.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Integer.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Enumeration.Name: SequencerFlashReferenceShadow
Enumeration.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Enumeration.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

EnumEntry.ToolTip: TODO
EnumEntry.Description: TODO

EnumEntry.Name: GlobalFlashWindow
EnumEntry.ToolTip: TODO
EnumEntry.Description: TODO.

Enumeration.Name: SequencerGainSelectorShadow
Enumeration.ToolTip: Category for the Sequencer Control features.
Enumeration.Description: Category for the Sequencer Control features.

Command.Name: AcquisitionStart
Command.ToolTip: Starts the acquisition of the camera.
Command.Description: Starts the acquisition of the camera. The number of captured images is specified by AcquisitionMode.

Command.Name: AcquisitionStop
Command.ToolTip: Stops the acquisition of the camera at the end of the current image.
Command.Description: Stops the acquisition of the camera at the end of the current image. It is mainly used when AcquisitionMode is Continuous but can be used in any acquisition mode.

Integer.Name: SensorWidth
Integer.ToolTip: Effective width of the sensor in pixels.
Integer.Description: Effective width of the sensor in pixels.

Integer.Name: SensorHeight
Integer.ToolTip: Effective height of the sensor in pixels.
Integer.Description: Effective height of the sensor in pixels.

Integer.Name: WidthMax
Integer.ToolTip: Maximum width of the image (in pixels).
Integer.Description: Maximum width of the image (in pixels). The dimension is calculated after horizontal binning, decimation or any other function changing the horizontal dimension of the image.

Integer.Name: HeightMax
Integer.ToolTip: Maximum height of the image (in pixels).
Integer.Description: Maximum height of the image (in pixels). This dimension is calculated after vertical binning, decimation or any other function changing the vertical dimension of the image.

Integer.Name: Width
Integer.ToolTip: Width of the image provided by the device (in pixels).
Integer.Description: Width of the image provided by the device (in pixels).

Integer.Name: Height
Integer.ToolTip: Height of the image provided by the device (in pixels).
Integer.Description: Height of the image provided by the device (in pixels).

Integer.Name: OffsetX
Integer.ToolTip: Horizontal offset from the origin to the region of interest (in pixels).
Integer.Description: Horizontal offset from the origin to the region of interest (in pixels).

Integer.Name: OffsetY
Integer.ToolTip: Vertical offset from the origin to the region of interest (in pixels).
Integer.Description: Vertical offset from the origin to the region of interest (in pixels).

Enumeration.Name: BinningSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which binning engine is controlled by the BinningHorizontal and BinningVertical features.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which binning engine is controlled by the BinningHorizontal and BinningVertical features.

EnumEntry.Name: Sensor
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selected features will control the sensor binning.
EnumEntry.Description: Selected features will control the sensor binning.

EnumEntry.Name: Sum
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The response from the combined cells will be added, resulting in increased sensitivity.
EnumEntry.Description: The response from the combined cells will be added, resulting in increased sensitivity.

EnumEntry.Name: Average
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The response from the combined cells will be averaged, resulting in increased signal/noise ratio.
EnumEntry.Description: The response from the combined cells will be averaged, resulting in increased signal/noise ratio.

EnumEntry.Name: Weighted
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Weighted
EnumEntry.Description: Weighted

EnumEntry.Name: Sum
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The response from the combined cells will be added, resulting in increased sensitivity.
EnumEntry.Description: The response from the combined cells will be added, resulting in increased sensitivity.

EnumEntry.Name: Average
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The response from the combined cells will be averaged, resulting in increased signal/noise ratio.
EnumEntry.Description: The response from the combined cells will be averaged, resulting in increased signal/noise ratio.

EnumEntry.Name: Weighted
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Weighted
EnumEntry.Description: Weighted

Integer.Name: BinningHorizontal
Integer.ToolTip: Number of horizontal photo-sensitive cells to combine together.
Integer.Description: Number of horizontal photo-sensitive cells to combine together. This reduces the horizontal resolution (width) of the image.

Integer.Name: BinningVertical
Integer.ToolTip: Number of vertical photo-sensitive cells to combine together.
Integer.Description: Number of vertical photo-sensitive cells to combine together. This reduces the vertical resolution (height) of the image.

EnumEntry.Name: Sensor
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Sensor
EnumEntry.Description: Sensor

EnumEntry.Name: Region0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Region0
EnumEntry.Description: Region0

Integer.Name: DecimationHorizontal
Integer.ToolTip: Horizontal sub-sampling of the image.
Integer.Description: Horizontal sub-sampling of the image. This reduces the horizontal resolution (width) of the image by the specified horizontal decimation factor.

Integer.Name: DecimationVertical
Integer.ToolTip: Vertical sub-sampling of the image.
Integer.Description: Vertical sub-sampling of the image. This reduces the vertical resolution (height) of the image by the specified vertical decimation factor.

Integer.Name: SensorClockFrequency
Integer.ToolTip: SensorClockFrequency
Integer.Description: SensorClockFrequency

Float.Name: AcquisitionFrameRate
Float.ToolTip: Controls the acquisition rate (in hertz) at which the images are captured.
Float.Description: Controls the acquisition rate (in hertz) at which the images are captured. If you increase ExposureTime and its new value is not applicable with the value of AcquisitionFrameRate, the frame rate will be reduced automatically. If you decrease ExposureTime again, the frame rate stays low and must be manually increased to the desired value.

Float.Name: ExposureTime
Float.ToolTip: Sets the Exposure time when ExposureMode is Timed and ExposureAuto is Off.
Float.Description: Sets the Exposure time when ExposureMode is Timed and ExposureAuto is Off. This controls the duration where the photosensitive cells are exposed to light.

Integer.Name: SensorExposureTimeClocks
Integer.ToolTip: SensorExposureTimeClocks
Integer.Description: SensorExposureTimeClocks

Integer.Name: SensorFrameTimeClocks
Integer.ToolTip: SensorFrameTimeClocks
Integer.Description: SensorFrameTimeClocks

Enumeration.Name: ExposureMode
Enumeration.ToolTip: Sets the exposure mode automatically depending on the trigger mode.
Enumeration.Description: Sets the exposure mode automatically depending on the trigger mode.

EnumEntry.Name: Timed
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Timed exposure. The exposure time is set using the ExposureTime or ExposureAuto features.
EnumEntry.Description: Timed exposure. The exposure time is set using the ExposureTime or ExposureAuto features. The exposure starts with the ExposureStart or LineStart trigger signal.

EnumEntry.Name: TriggerControlled
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Uses one or more trigger signals to control the exposure.
EnumEntry.Description: Uses one or more trigger signals to control the exposure. See ExposureStart and ExposureEnd of the TriggerSelector feature.

Float.Name: TriggerControlledExposureTimeMin
Float.ToolTip: Minimum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureMode is TriggerControlled.
Float.Description: Minimum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureMode is TriggerControlled. When a Trigger on ExposureEnd is active but is received too early, the exposure of the image is stopped after TriggerControlledExposureTimeMin. For Sensors with overlapping image acquisition, the overlap of the images is limited by TriggerControlledExposureTimeMin.

Integer.Name: TriggerControlledExposureTimeClocksMin
Integer.ToolTip: TriggerControlledExposureTimeClocksMin
Integer.Description: TriggerControlledExposureTimeClocksMin

Integer.Name: TriggerControlledExposureTimeClocksMax
Integer.ToolTip: TriggerControlledExposureTimeClocksMax
Integer.Description: TriggerControlledExposureTimeClocksMax

Float.Name: TriggerControlledExposureTimeMax
Float.ToolTip: Maximum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureMode is TriggerControlled.
Float.Description: Maximum limit of ExposureTime when ExposureMode is TriggerControlled. When a Trigger on ExposureEnd is active but is not received in time, the exposure of the image is stopped after TriggerControlledExposureTimeMax.

Enumeration.Name: TestPattern
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the type of test pattern that is generated by the device as image source.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the type of test pattern that is generated by the device as image source.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Image is coming from the sensor.
EnumEntry.Description: Image is coming from the sensor.

EnumEntry.Name: GreyHorizontalRamp
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Image is filled horizontally with an image that goes from the darkest possible value to the brightest.
EnumEntry.Description: Image is filled horizontally with an image that goes from the darkest possible value to the brightest.

EnumEntry.Name: GreyDiagonalRampMoving
EnumEntry.ToolTip: GreyDiagonalRampMoving
EnumEntry.Description: GreyDiagonalRampMoving

EnumEntry.Name: SequencePattern1
EnumEntry.ToolTip: SequencePattern1
EnumEntry.Description: SequencePattern1

EnumEntry.Name: SequencePattern2
EnumEntry.ToolTip: SequencePattern2
EnumEntry.Description: SequencePattern2

EnumEntry.Name: FPGAWhite
EnumEntry.ToolTip: White generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: White generated by FPGA

EnumEntry.Name: FPGAVerticalGrayscale
EnumEntry.ToolTip: VerticalGrayscale generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: VerticalGrayscale generated by FPGA

EnumEntry.Name: FPGAChessboard
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Chessboard generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: Chessboard generated by FPGA

EnumEntry.Name: FPGABlack
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: Black generated by FPGA

EnumEntry.Name: FPGAGrayscale
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Grayscale generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: Grayscale generated by FPGA

EnumEntry.Name: FPGAFramecount
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Framecount generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: Framecount generated by FPGA

EnumEntry.Name: FPGAColorStripe
EnumEntry.ToolTip: ColorStripe generated by FPGA
EnumEntry.Description: ColorStripe generated by FPGA

Enumeration.Name: DeviceClockSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the source for DeviceClockFrequency.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the source for DeviceClockFrequency.

EnumEntry.Name: Sensor
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Clock frequency of the image sensor of the camera.
EnumEntry.Description: Clock frequency of the image sensor of the camera.

Float.Name: DeviceClockFrequency
Float.ToolTip: Returns the frequency of the clock selected in DeviceClockSelector.
Float.Description: Returns the frequency of the clock selected in DeviceClockSelector.

Enumeration.Name: SubRegionSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Defines the auto function to be calculated based on the sub region, e.g. ExposureAuto and GainAuto.
Enumeration.Description: Defines the auto function to be calculated based on the sub region, e.g. ExposureAuto and GainAuto. AutoFeatureBrightnessAuto: The image information from the sub region is used for ExposureAuto and GainAuto. AutoFeatureBalanceWhiteAuto: The image information from the sub region is used for AutoWhiteBalance.

EnumEntry.Name: AutoFeatureBrightnessAuto
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The image information from the sub region is used for ExposureAuto and GainAuto.
EnumEntry.Description: The image information from the sub region is used for ExposureAuto and GainAuto.

EnumEntry.Name: AutoFeatureBalanceWhiteAuto
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The image information from the sub region is used for AutoWhiteBalance.
EnumEntry.Description: The image information from the sub region is used for AutoWhiteBalance.

Enumeration.Name: SubRegionSourceSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Defines inside which ROI the sub region is located.
Enumeration.Description: Defines inside which ROI the sub region is located. Values description Region0: The sub region is located in ROI 0.

EnumEntry.Name: Region0
EnumEntry.ToolTip: The sub region is located in ROI 0.
EnumEntry.Description: The sub region is located in ROI 0.

Boolean.Name: SubRegionFollowSource
Boolean.ToolTip: Defines whether the subregion corresponds to the ROI or is only a part of the ROI.
Boolean.Description: Defines whether the subregion corresponds to the ROI or is only a part of the ROI. Values description True: The sub region covers the region selected in SubRegionSourceSelector. False: The sub region can be limited to a ROI relative to the region selected in SubRegionSourceSelector.

Integer.Name: SubRegionWidth
Integer.ToolTip: Width of the selected sub region.
Integer.Description: Width of the selected sub region. Only available when SubRegionFollowSource = False

Integer.Name: SubRegionHeight
Integer.ToolTip: Height of the selected sub region.
Integer.Description: Height of the selected sub region. Only available when SubRegionFollowSource = False

Integer.Name: SubRegionOffsetX
Integer.ToolTip: Horizontal offset in pixels from the origin of the ROI to the selected sub region.
Integer.Description: Horizontal offset in pixels from the origin of the ROI to the selected sub region. Only available when SubRegionFollowSource = False

Integer.Name: SubRegionOffsetY
Integer.ToolTip: Vertical offset in pixels from the origin of the ROI to the selected sub region.
Integer.Description: Vertical offset in pixels from the origin of the ROI to the selected sub region. Only available when SubRegionFollowSource = False

Boolean.Name: ReverseX
Boolean.ToolTip: Flip horizontally the image sent by the device.
Boolean.Description: Flip horizontally the image sent by the device. The Region of interest is applied after the flipping.

Boolean.Name: ReverseY
Boolean.ToolTip: Flip vertically the image sent by the device.
Boolean.Description: Flip vertically the image sent by the device. The Region of interest is applied after the flipping.

Boolean.Name: ChunkModeActive
Boolean.ToolTip: Activates the inclusion of the chunk data in the payload of the image.
Boolean.Description: Activates the inclusion of the chunk data in the payload of the image.

Enumeration.Name: ChunkSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects which Chunk to enable or control.
Enumeration.Description: Selects which Chunk to enable or control.

EnumEntry.Name: OffsetX
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects OffsetX as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects OffsetX as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: OffsetY
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects OffsetY as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects OffsetY as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: Width
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects Width as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects Width as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: Height
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects Height as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects Height as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: PixelFormat
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects PixelFormat as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects PixelFormat as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: Timestamp
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the Timestamp as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the Timestamp as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureTime
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the exposure time as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the exposure time as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: Gain
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the gain as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the gain as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: SequencerSetActive
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the SequencerSetActive as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the SequencerSetActive as chunk.

EnumEntry.Name: ExposureTriggerTimestamp
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the Exposure Trigger Timestamp as chunk.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the Exposure Trigger Timestamp as chunk.

Boolean.Name: ChunkEnable
Boolean.ToolTip: Enables the inclusion of the selected chunk data in the payload of the image.
Boolean.Description: Enables the inclusion of the selected chunk data in the payload of the image. With ChunkEnable and ChunkSelector you can control which information should be included in the chunk data. To activate chunk data, you must set ChunkModeActive to True.

Integer.Name: ChunkOffsetX
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the OffsetX of the image included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Returns the OffsetX of the image included in the payload.

Integer.Name: ChunkOffsetY
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the OffsetY of the image included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Returns the OffsetY of the image included in the payload.

Integer.Name: ChunkWidth
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the Width of the image included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Returns the Width of the image included in the payload.

Integer.Name: ChunkHeight
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the Height of the image included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Returns the Height of the image included in the payload.

Enumeration.Name: ChunkPixelFormat
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the PixelFormat of the image included in the payload.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the PixelFormat of the image included in the payload.

Float.Name: ChunkExposureTime
Float.ToolTip: Returns the exposure time of the image included in the payload.
Float.Description: Returns the exposure time of the image included in the payload.

Integer.Name: ChunkExposureTimeClocks
Integer.ToolTip: ChunkSensorExposureTimeClocks
Integer.Description: ChunkSensorExposureTimeClocks

Integer.Name: ChunkSensorClockFrequency
Integer.ToolTip: ChunkSensorClockFrequency
Integer.Description: ChunkSensorClockFrequency

Integer.Name: ChunkTimestamp
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the timestamp of the image included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Returns the timestamp of the image included in the payload. The timestamp represents the time of the FrameStart internal event. The availability of ChunkTimestamp depends on the sensor. For some cameras, the timestamp can only be returned when the "ExposureStart" trigger is enabled. Otherwise it returns "0".

Integer.Name: ChunkExposureTriggerTimestamp
Integer.ToolTip: Returns the timestamp of the of the ExposureTrigger of the image included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Returns the timestamp of the of the ExposureTrigger of the image included in the payload. The timestamp represents the time of the ExposureTrigger internal event. ChunkExposureTriggerTimestamp returns "0" when the "ExposureStart" trigger is disabled.

Integer.Name: PayloadSize
Integer.ToolTip: Provides the number of bytes transferred for each image or chunk on the stream channel.
Integer.Description: Provides the number of bytes transferred for each image or chunk on the stream channel. This includes any end-of-line, end-of-frame statistics or other stamp data. This is the total size of data payload for a data block.

Enumeration.Name: ChunkGainSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls, which gain is selected for ChunkGain.
Enumeration.Description: Controls, which gain is selected for ChunkGain.

EnumEntry.Name: AnalogAll
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the AnalogAll gain.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the AnalogAll gain.

EnumEntry.Name: DigitalAll
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Selects the DigitalAll gain.
EnumEntry.Description: Selects the DigitalAll gain.

Float.Name: ChunkGain
Float.ToolTip: Returns the selected gain of the image included in the payload.
Float.Description: Returns the selected gain of the image included in the payload.

Integer.Name: ChunkSequencerSetActive
Integer.ToolTip: Return the index of the active set of the running sequencer included in the payload.
Integer.Description: Return the index of the active set of the running sequencer included in the payload.

Enumeration.Name: PixelSize
Enumeration.ToolTip: Total size in bits of a pixel of the image.
Enumeration.Description: Total size in bits of a pixel of the image.

EnumEntry.Description: 1 bit per pixel.

EnumEntry.Description: 2 bits per pixel.

Enumeration.ToolTip: Type of color filter that is applied to the image.
Enumeration.Description: Type of color filter that is applied to the image.

EnumEntry.Description: No color filter.

Enumeration.Name: PixelFilter
Enumeration.ToolTip: Type of filter applied to the image pixels.
Enumeration.Description: Type of filter applied to the image pixels. This register holds the same value as PixelColorFormat for non-polarization cameras.

EnumEntry.ToolTip: None
EnumEntry.Description: None

Enumeration.Name: ComponentSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects a component to activate/deactivate its data streaming.
Enumeration.Description: Selects a component to activate/deactivate its data streaming. The ComponentSelector determines which data acquisition component to control. For standard 2D cameras the default image component is "Intensity".

EnumEntry.Name: Intensity
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Intensity
EnumEntry.Description: Intensity

Boolean.Name: ComponentEnable
Boolean.ToolTip: Controls if the selected component streaming is active.
Boolean.Description: Controls if the selected component streaming is active.

Integer.Name: ComponentEnableAll
Integer.ToolTip: Component Enable All
Integer.Description: Component Enable All

Enumeration.Name: PixelFormat
Enumeration.ToolTip: Format of the pixels provided by the device.
Enumeration.Description: Format of the pixels provided by the device. It represents all the information provided by PixelSize, PixelColorFilter combined in a single feature.

EnumEntry.Name: Mono8
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Monochrome 8-bit
EnumEntry.Description: Monochrome 8-bit

EnumEntry.Name: Mono10p
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Monochrome 10-bit packed
EnumEntry.Description: Monochrome 10-bit packed

EnumEntry.Name: Mono12p
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Monochrome 12-bit packed
EnumEntry.Description: Monochrome 12-bit packed

EnumEntry.Name: Mono10
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Monochrome 10-bit unpacked
EnumEntry.Description: Monochrome 10-bit unpacked

EnumEntry.Name: Mono12
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Monochrome 12-bit unpacked
EnumEntry.Description: Monochrome 12-bit unpacked

Enumeration.Name: GainSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Selects the Gain to be configured.
Enumeration.Description: Selects the Gain to be configured. The gains supported by a camera depend on the sensor and may differ. Typically, color cameras either support digital or analog color gains.

EnumEntry.Name: AnalogAll
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Gain will be applied to all analog channels.
EnumEntry.Description: Gain will be applied to all analog channels.

EnumEntry.Name: DigitalAll
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Gain will be applied to all digital channels.
EnumEntry.Description: Gain will be applied to all digital channels.

Boolean.Name: ADCGainCorrection
Boolean.ToolTip: ADCGainCorrection enables a predefined gain correction value.
Boolean.Description: ADCGainCorrection enables a predefined gain correction value. This correction allows to use the full dynamic range of the sensor. "AnalogAll" is expanded to its full possible range when ADCGainCorrection is disabled.

Float.Name: Gain
Float.ToolTip: Controls the gain selected in GainSelector.
Float.Description: Controls the gain selected in GainSelector. The gain is an amplification factor applied to all pixel values. Increasing gain, the image will appear brighter. For best image quality, it is recommended to use small gain values and to increase ExposureTime instead. The gain step width depends on the sensor. For automatic gain control, use GainAuto. For manually adjusting the white balance for color cameras, select a color gain with GainSelector and change the Gain value.

Enumeration.Name: BlackLevelSelector
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns which BlackLevel is controlled by the black level features.
Enumeration.Description: Returns which BlackLevel is controlled by the black level features. Changing the PixelFormat to a different bit depth, the value of BlackLevelSelector will be adapted to the new format automatically.

EnumEntry.Name: All8Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 8-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 8-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: All10Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 10-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 10-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: All12Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 12-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 12-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: All14Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 14-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 14-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: All16Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 16-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 16-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: Offset8Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 8-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 8-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: Offset10Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 10-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 10-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: Offset12Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 12-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 12-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: Offset14Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 14-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 14-bit Pixelformat

EnumEntry.Name: Offset16Bit
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 16-bit Pixelformat
EnumEntry.Description: Black Level will be applied to all channels scaled to 16-bit Pixelformat

Integer.Name: BlackLevelInt
Integer.ToolTip: BlackLevelInt
Integer.Description: BlackLevelInt

Integer.Name: PixelDepthBitPerChannel
Integer.ToolTip: PixelDepthBitPerChannel
Integer.Description: PixelDepthBitPerChannel

Float.Name: BlackLevel
Float.ToolTip: Controls the analog black level for the selected bit depth.
Float.Description: Controls the analog black level for the selected bit depth. The BlackLevel is an offset that applies to all pixel values. Changing the PixelFormat to a different bit depth, the value and range of BlackLevel will be adapted to the new format automatically.

Enumeration.Name: BlackLevelAuto
Enumeration.ToolTip: Controls the mode for automatic black level adjustment. The exact algorithm used to implement this adjustment is device-specific.
Enumeration.Description: Controls the mode for automatic black level adjustment. The exact algorithm used to implement this adjustment is device-specific.

EnumEntry.Name: Off
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Analog black level is user controlled using BlackLevel.
EnumEntry.Description: Analog black level is user controlled using BlackLevel.

EnumEntry.Name: Continuous
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Analog black level is constantly adjusted by the device.
EnumEntry.Description: Analog black level is constantly adjusted by the device.

EnumEntry.Name: ContinuousWithOffset
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Analog black level is constantly adjusted by the device with offset.
EnumEntry.Description: Analog black level is constantly adjusted by the device with offset.

Enumeration.Name: DeviceOpticalFilterType
Enumeration.ToolTip: Returns the optical filter type of the camera.
Enumeration.Description: Returns the optical filter type of the camera.

EnumEntry.Name: Unknown
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Unknown optical filter type.
EnumEntry.Description: Unknown optical filter type.

EnumEntry.Name: None
EnumEntry.ToolTip: No optical filter.
EnumEntry.Description: No optical filter.

EnumEntry.Name: HQ
EnumEntry.ToolTip: IR cut-off filter for high quality color rendering.
EnumEntry.Description: IR cut-off filter for high quality color rendering.

EnumEntry.Name: GL
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Glass filter for dirt protection.
EnumEntry.Description: Glass filter for dirt protection.

EnumEntry.Name: DL
EnumEntry.ToolTip: Daylight-cut filter.
EnumEntry.Description: Daylight-cut filter.

Float.Name: SensorPixelWidth
Float.ToolTip: Returns the physical pixel size (in um) in x direction.
Float.Description: Returns the physical pixel size (in um) in x direction.

Float.Name: SensorPixelHeight
Float.ToolTip: Returns the physical pixel size (in um) in y direction.
Float.Description: Returns the physical pixel size (in um) in y direction.

StringReg.Name: DeviceUserID
StringReg.Description: User-defined camera name. String with max. 15 characters.

StringReg.Name: DeviceFamilyName
StringReg.ToolTip: Identifier of the product family of the camera.
StringReg.Description: Identifier of the product family of the camera.

StringReg.Name: DeviceSerialNumber
StringReg.ToolTip: Returns the serial number of the camera.
StringReg.Description: Returns the serial number of the camera. This string is a unique identifier of the camera.

Register.Name: FileAccessBuffer
Register.Description: Defines the intermediate access buffer that allows the exchange of data between the camera file storage and the application. This register mapped FileAccessBuffer must be written with the target data before executing a write operation. For read operation, the data can be read from the FileAccessBuffer after the read operation has been executed. The effective data transfer is done upon FileOperationExecute execution. The maximum length of FileAccessBuffer depends on the camera hardware.

String.Name: SensorName
String.ToolTip: Returns the product name of the imaging sensor.
String.Description: Returns the product name of the imaging sensor.

Port.Name: Device
Port.ToolTip: Port node giving access to the camera

Integer.Name: TLParamsLocked
Integer.ToolTip: Integer parameter: 1 when grabbing, 0 when not

IntSwissKnife.Name: IsTriggerActivationHighImplemented
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if the Trigger feature is switched on

IntSwissKnife.Name: IsTriggerActivationLowImplemented
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if the Trigger feature is switched on

IntSwissKnife.Name: IsTriggerSelectorModeLocked
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if the Trigger feature is switched on

IntSwissKnife.Name: IsTimerActiveImplemented
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if the Trigger feature is switched on

IntSwissKnife.Name: IsCounterActiveImplemented
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if the Trigger feature is switched on

IntSwissKnife.Name: IsNotTriggerActivationLevelLoHi
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if the Trigger feature is switched on

IntSwissKnife.Name: IS_AREA_SCAN
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if camera is in Areascan mode

IntSwissKnife.Name: IS_LINE_SCAN
IntSwissKnife.ToolTip: Determines if camera is in Linescan mode
